rows.label: tev066801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev066801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Zo Ozuchi what makes people strong.

rows.label: tev066801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev066801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Zo Ozuchi what he is doing.

rows.label: tev066801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Zo Ozuchi about Primordial Wilderness.

rows.label: tev066801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Zo Ozuchi about recent developments.

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0001
rows.name:
I see many different strengths in people. The
Larsian man who quests alone and proud... The
Larsian woman who thirsts to avenge her brothers...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Then there is the one with the strange
doppelganger technique... Not to mention the
Nopon woman with confidence in her skills.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0003
rows.name:
And forget not the Bias woman who betrayed her
Growth masters, or the green-skinned technician
who keeps our water safe. ...And then there is you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0004
rows.name:
My hope and desire is that these great
warriors will gather together in a
gauntlet none will ever forget![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0005
rows.name:
What say you? Do you see the
same strength as I? Do you
know whom it is I speak of?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0010
rows.name:
This should give us enough space
to stage even the roughest fight
without causing trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0011
rows.name: ...Hmm? What am I doing, you ask?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ha ha ha! Why, I merely seek a
venue for the Larsian Battle
Gauntlet—one of our finest traditions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0013
rows.name:
The "Arms," as you call them,
use this area day and night to
test a whole slew of weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0014
rows.name:
It will not be easy, but provided I can convince
them to lend me the space, I can immediately set
about finding the city's strongest for the Gauntlet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0015
rows.name:
I trust you will compete as well, if
you think you have what it takes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Preparations for the Larsian
Battle Gauntlet are complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Well, mostly complete. I still
struggle to convince the Arms to
lend me their test hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0018
rows.name:
I originally tried asking some BLADEs face-to-face,
but they insisted I go through some sort of
terminal to make my request. What a bother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Many powerful indigens still remain
in the region. Have you seen them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Fallshorn Isle is home to a saltat
an order of magnitude stronger than
any I reckon you have seen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0022
rows.name:
And inside Talon Rock is a
colony of vicious vespers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0023
rows.name:
I tell you, Mira is a fine planet
to train on. Ha ha! Truly it is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0024
rows.name:
I will take these great foes on,
better myself as a warrior, and
return to challenge you again one day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ah! The strongest warrior in the land
returns! What a surprise to see you here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0027
rows.name:
As you see, I am training.
Would you care to spar?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Ha! I jest. Mira has hordes
of able opponents— you need not
waste your time with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0029
rows.name:
We can save our rematch for the
next Larsian Battle Gauntlet.
I shall look forward to it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066801_MSG0030
rows.name:
Now then, back to training. With
rivals like you near, I cannot afford
to laze about a second longer![ST:wait ]
